attacking_style: Late-race opportunist who accelerates in final 400m-1km, particularly on technical or chaotic finishes. Targets KOM points from breakaways but struggles to sustain efforts on final climbs when pressure intensifies.
team_tactics: Operates with significant autonomy, often in breakaways. Team support appears minimal in observations; relies on individual positioning and veteran race-reading rather than domestique-led setups.
terrain_preference: Short uphill drags and technical finishes where positioning chaos rewards experience. Effective in early/intermediate KOM sprints but exposed on sustained final climbs requiring pure climbing power.
vulnerability: Dropped from breakaways on final sustained climbs despite earlier strength. Late bridge attempts within final 400m consistently come too late to affect race outcome.
key_patterns: Multiple second-place finishes after late chases, showing strong finishing kick but timing gaps (2017, 2018)
Active KOM jersey hunter from breakaways, strategic about point collection over stage wins (2020 x2)
Veteran positioning skills exploit chaotic/technical finishes effectively (2017, 2018)
Fades on sustained final climbs after earlier efforts in breakaways (2020 pattern)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2020 showed strategic KOM focus without stage-winning power, managing points efficiently but lacking explosive finish seen in 2017-2018
